title: Pomkots Mechs
description: Adds variety of mechs such as vehicles, mobs, bosses to your world!
body:
![title](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a46c477f-d1d2-48d9-ae31-c8837e2313e3)

# What's this?

This is a mod for Minecraft Java Edition. It adds various mechs

## Introduction
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Rh1F8ytDgik" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Mech Customize Feature Introduction & Quick Start
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KZE_YVSoytc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## [New] Added new bosses, mobs, mechs!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/P6M_BCFKypY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## FYI: If you need a post apocalyptic map

Try [Pomkots World](https://modrinth.com/mod/pomkots-world), Lost Cities Add-on, for world generation!

## Contents

* Included
    * Entity types: Vehicles, Mobs, Bosses
    * Items to summon the above entities
* Not Included
    * Drop tables
    * Custom recipes
    * Auto-spawn in the field
    * Biomes

This mod is actually a standalone combat portion of a Mod Pack game the creator plans to make in the future. Therefore, the mod will be actively updated with features necessary for that game, but features for other uses may have lower priority.

For more about the intended game, please check below!

https://minecraft-hourouki.hatenablog.com/entry/2024/09/05/230455

# Mod Status

**Very Alpha**

Note: The creator is a beginner in modding, and this is the first project. The creator does not take responsibility for any issues or damages caused by the use of this mod. Use at your own risk, and make sure to back up your data first!

If you could kindly provide feedback, advice, or bug reports, it would be greatly appreciated!

# Elements to be added

## Entities

### Vehicles: PMV Series

![2024-11-02_23 11 54](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fc830331-abf5-46c6-bd69-65026d526e57)

* PMV01: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pmv01
    * The red one
* PMV01B: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pmv01b
    * The black one (same functions as PMV01, only color is different)

### Mobs: PMS Series

![2024-11-02_23 14 24](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ed483d68-332f-4561-a358-8e176596fcf8)

Enemy mobs that start moving in Survival Mode

* PMS01: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pms01
    * Charges at you full speed
* PMS02: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pms02
    * Floats and attacks from above
* PMS03: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pms03
    * Fires physical bullets
* PMS04: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pms04
    * Launches missiles
* PMS05: id=entity.pomkotsmechs.pms05
    * Multi-legged type that throws grenades

### Bosses: PMB Series

![2024-11-02_23 15 45](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/01e7b468-ec2a-4e8d-a88d-0de6ec3b1f29)

* PMB01
    * A boss focused on relentless power attacks
    * Terrain is only destroyed by attacks if the difficulty is set to Hard and mob-driven terrain destruction is enabled.

## Items

### Item Group

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cb40c0de-c5e5-486b-9006-a3fe5889f83c)

In Creative Mode, all items are listed under the “Pomkots Mechs” tab.

### Normal Items

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/75496b01-bd34-427c-8e93-a8af2d3f2ace)

* Core Stone PMV01: id=item.pomkotsmechs.corestone_pmv01
    * Right-click to summon PMV01 once, left-click to heal PMV01.
* Core Stone PMV01B: id=item.pomkotsmechs.corestone_pmv01b
    * Same as above for PMV01B
* Core Stone PMB01: id=item.pomkotsmechs.corestone_pmb01
    * Allows you to ride mobs and bosses. No other specific function.

### Spawn Eggs

Spawn eggs are available for mobs and bosses
* Spawn egg PMB01: id=item.pomkotsmechs.pmb01_spawn_egg
* Spawn egg PMS01-05: id=item.pomkotsmechs.pms01-05_spawn_egg

# Recommended Hardware Setup

This mod is resource-heavy, generating a lot of objects, so a high-spec machine (especially with strong graphics performance) is recommended.

Below is the setup used by the creator during development, which should match the performance in videos uploaded to YouTube:

* CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-14700F 2.10 GHz
* Memory: DDR4 16GB
* Disk: SSD 800GB
* GPU: GeForce RTX4070 Ti SUPER

# Required Minecraft/Mods

* Minecraft: 1.20.1
* Fabric or Forge
* geckolib: 1.20.1-4.4.9
* leawind_third_person: 2.1.0
* modmenu: 7.2.2
* cloth_config: 11.1.118
* architectury_api: 9.2.14

(Forge compatibility is planned for the official release…)

# Recommended Mods

* iris-1.7.2+mc1.20.1
* sodium-fabric-0.5.11+mc1.20.1
* indium-1.0.34+mc1.20.1
* Controlify-2.0.0-beta.13+1.20.1 (fabric)

# Recommended Shader Pack

BSL Original_v8.3

Note: Since this mod's visuals are designed with BSL Shader, graphics without a shader pack may look lackluster.

# How to Start

**Be sure to back up your data first!**

Assuming the mod jar files are already installed and a launch configuration is set up:

## 1. Key Configuration

Refer to the key configuration below and set it up as you prefer.

## 2. Leawind's Third Person Configuration

Mods > Leawind's Third Person > Configure

* Common > Player Entity Rotation > Force player to rotate with the camera: Enable
* Common > Player Entity Rotation > Player rotate to intrest point: Enable
* Camera Offset > Normal Mode > X Offset: 0

## 3. (Optional) Controlify Configuration

Mods > Controlify > Configure

* Basic > Sprint: Hold

## 4. (Optional) BSL Shader Configuration

Options > Video Settings... > Shader Packs

* Shaders: Enabled
* BSLOriginal_v8.d.zip: Selected
* Shader Pack Settings > Material > Advanced Materials: On
* Shader Pack Settings > Material > Material Format: labPBR 1.3

# Key Configs (Default)
Strongly recommend to change key configs for your comfortable use.

*I'm using a PS5 controller tuned for AC6 :)

* Mode Switch: Y key
    * Switches between Combat Mode and Construction Mode.
* Combat Mode
    * Right Arm Weapon (Gatling Gun): Left-click
    * Left Arm Weapon (Pile Bunker): Right-click
    * Right Shoulder Weapon (Vertical Missile Launcher): P key
    * Left Shoulder Weapon (Grenade Cannon): O key
* Construction Mode
    * Hammer: Left-click
    * Shovel: Right-click

# Usage Instructions

* Summon Vehicles (PMV01)
    * Hold "Core Stone PMV01" or "Core Stone PMV01B" in the main hand
    * Right-click near yourself to summon the vehicle once
* Heal Vehicles
    * Hold "Core Stone PMV01" or "Core Stone PMV01B" in the main hand
    * Left-click the vehicle to heal
* Summon mobs or bosses
    * Use the corresponding spawn egg to summon
    * Mobs do not move in Creative Mode.
* Fight mobs or bosses
    * Switch to Survival Mode with mobs or bosses placed.
* Ride mobs or bosses
    * Hold "Core Stone PMB01" in the main hand and right-click the desired target.

# Current Thoughts on Licensing and Asset Sharing
The creator has greatly benefited from open-source software (OSS) in other industries and appreciates the value of OSS in mod development as well, so the intent is to make this mod open-source in the future. However, for now (at least during the alpha and beta phases), it will remain ARR (All Rights Reserved) and private.

The reason is that the creator has no experience in mod or OSS development, and there’s uncertainty about how things might develop after release. Therefore, the creator would like to observe how things go for a while. Additionally, since the creator currently has no influence or connections, it’s important to first establish a stable position for both this mod and themselves.

Once the full version is released and things settle down, the plan is to transition to OSS and fully release the assets under an MIT or GPL3 license.

# Messages from the Creator

## To Everyone

Please enjoy the mod! Feedback, ideas, and bug reports are very welcome; feel free to submit them in the Issues section of this repository!

## To Mod Developers

If anyone out there is interested in collaborating or submitting pull requests, please feel free to reach out! Also, I'm actively looking for advice—particularly on performance optimization and maintainability.

## To Datapack / Resource Pack / Map Creators

My hands are full just creating the entities, so I don’t have the bandwidth to integrate this mod fully into Survival Mode. Therefore, if anyone could use this mod to create new biomes, maps, recipes, or loot tables, I would be extremely grateful!

## To Content Creators

This mod offers a lot of different ways to play, so I’d be thrilled to see it featured in your videos and creative projects!

# Sites Providing Assets Used in This Mod

* Textures: Poly Haven
    * https://polyhaven.com/
* Sound Effects: Sound-Effect Lab
    * https://soundeffect-lab.info/
* Sound Effects: OtoLogic
    * https://otologic.jp/
